name: Eric Gravatt
abstract: Eric Kamau Grávátt (born March 6, 1947) is an American jazz drummer. He has played with McCoy Tyner, Joe Henderson, Weather Report, Byard Lancaster, and Dom Um Romão.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Weather Report, Roy Haynes Hip Ensemble, Tony Williams's Lifetime, and the Archie Schepp Quintet

about_quotes.speaker: Tyner McCoy
about_quotes.evidence: I enjoyed having him in my band and as a friend... we kind of came together and we created an atmosphere rhythmically and harmonically
about_quotes.doc_title: Tyner McCoy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: my original Weather Report inspiration was hearing the way Alphonse Mouzon and Eric Gravatt played
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020
